MERGE (src1:Source {id:'lumen-blacklotuslabs-zuorat'})
ON CREATE SET
  src1.title = 'ZuoRAT: novel multistage RAT targeting SOHO routers via known vulnerabilities',
  src1.publisher = 'Lumen Technologies - Black Lotus Labs'
WITH src1

MERGE (mal1:Malware {name:'ZuoRAT'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal1.family = 'RAT',
  mal1.summary = 'Novel multistage remote access trojan active since April 2020 targeting popular SOHO routers; accesses local LAN, captures packets, and stages man-in-the-middle attacks via DNS and HTTPS hijacking.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal1.family = COALESCE(mal1.family, 'RAT'),
  mal1.summary = CASE WHEN (mal1.summary IS NULL OR trim(mal1.summary) = '') THEN 'Novel multistage remote access trojan active since April 2020 targeting popular SOHO routers; accesses local LAN, captures packets, and stages man-in-the-middle attacks via DNS and HTTPS hijacking.' ELSE mal1.summary END
WITH src1, mal1

MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'zuorat-soho-routers-activity-2020-04'})
ON CREATE SET
  inc1.date = date('2020-04-01'),
  inc1.type = 'intrusion',
  inc1.summary = 'Activity involving ZuoRAT, a multistage RAT active since April 2020, exploiting known vulnerabilities to target popular SOHO routers (Cisco, Netgear, Asus and others) and enabling LAN access, packet capture, and MITM via DNS/HTTPS hijacking.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc1.date = COALESCE(inc1.date, date('2020-04-01')),
  inc1.type = COALESCE(inc1.type, 'intrusion'),
  inc1.summary = CASE WHEN (inc1.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc1.summary) = '') THEN 'Activity involving ZuoRAT, a multistage RAT active since April 2020, exploiting known vulnerabilities to target popular SOHO routers (Cisco, Netgear, Asus and others) and enabling LAN access, packet capture, and MITM via DNS/HTTPS hijacking.' ELSE inc1.summary END
WITH src1, mal1, inc1

MERGE (date1:Date {value: date('2020-04-01')})
MERGE (inc1)-[r_occur1:occurred_on]->(date1)
ON CREATE SET r_occur1.date = date('2020-04-01')
WITH src1, mal1, inc1

MERGE (inc1)-[r_invm1:involved_malware]->(mal1)
ON CREATE SET
  r_invm1.evidence = 'A novel multistage remote access trojan (RAT) that’s been active since April 2020 ... The malware, dubbed ZuoRAT',
  r_invm1.source_id = src1.id
WITH src1, mal1, inc1

MERGE (vic1:Victim {name:'SOHO routers (Cisco, Netgear, Asus and others)'})
ON CREATE SET
  vic1.sector = 'Technology',
  vic1.summary = 'Popular SOHO routers from Cisco Systems, Netgear, Asus and others targeted by ZuoRAT.'
ON MATCH SET
  vic1.sector = COALESCE(vic1.sector, 'Technology'),
  vic1.summary = CASE WHEN (vic1.summary IS NULL OR trim(vic1.summary) = '') THEN 'Popular SOHO routers from Cisco Systems, Netgear, Asus and others targeted by ZuoRAT.' ELSE vic1.summary END
WITH src1, mal1, inc1, vic1

MERGE (inc1)-[r_tgt1:targets]->(vic1)
ON CREATE SET
  r_tgt1.date = date('2020-04-01'),
  r_tgt1.evidence = '... exploiting known vulnerabilities to target popular SOHO routers from Cisco Systems, Netgear, Asus and others.',
  r_tgt1.source_id = src1.id
WITH src1, mal1, inc1, vic1

MERGE (tech1:Technique {technique_id:'T1210'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech1.name = 'Exploitation of Remote Services',
